title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
